---
title: "Breast Cancer Diversity Analysis"
author: "Monica Kim"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(rstatix)
library(readr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
# receptors
receptors <- c(
  "IGH",
  "IGK",
  "IGL",
  "TRA",
  "TRA+TRB",
  "TRB",
  "TRD",
  "TRG",
  "TRG+TRD",
  "TRs+IGs"
)

#-----------------------------
# LOAD FILES
#-----------------------------

sra <- read_csv("SraRunTable.csv")
clinical <- read_csv("clinical.csv")

#-----------------------------
# CLEAN SAMPLE NAME
#-----------------------------
# Example:
# S219000833FR.Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.addGroup.bam
# ->
# S219000833FR

sra <- sra %>%
  mutate(
    patient_clean = str_remove(`Sample Name`, "\\..*$")
  )

#-----------------------------
# CREATE SRR -> PATIENT MAP
#-----------------------------

run_map <- sra %>%
  select(
    Run,
    patient_clean
  ) %>%
  rename(patient_clinical = patient_clean)

#-----------------------------
# PROCESS EACH RECEPTOR FILE
#-----------------------------

for (rec in receptors) {

  # input file
  infile <- paste0(rec, "_CDR3_Div-Only_2026-05-17.csv")

  # output file
  outfile <- paste0(rec, "_CDR3_Div+Clin_2026-05-17.csv")

  # load diversity file
  div <- read_csv(infile)

  # clean SRR patient column
  # Example:
  # SRR31139166.Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam
  # ->
  # SRR31139166

  div <- div %>%
    mutate(
      Run = str_remove(patient, "\\..*$")
    )

  # attach clinical patient ID using Run
  div2 <- div %>%
    left_join(run_map, by = "Run")

  # attach clinical metadata
  div3 <- div2 %>%
    left_join(
      clinical,
      by = c("patient_clinical" = "patient")
    )

  # optional cleanup
  div3 <- div3 %>%
    select(
      patient,
      lowQ,
      highQ,
      deltaqD,
      IPq,
      IPslope,
      qDatIPq,
      Shan,
      Simp,
      everything(),
      -Run
    )

  # save
  write_csv(div3, outfile)

  cat("Wrote:", outfile, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
# define receptors
receptors <- c("IGH", "IGK", "IGL", "TRA", "TRA+TRB", "TRB", "TRD", "TRG", "TRG+TRD", "TRs+IGs")

# clean patient IDs
clean_id <- function(x) {
  str_remove(x, ".Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam")
}

# TODO: Replace the hard-coded output date with YOUR actual data run date when loading CSV files

# load all Div+Clin files into one dataframe
div_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CDR3_Div+Clin_2026-05-17.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all PerPatient stats
stats_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_PerPatientCountStats_2026-05-17.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

# load all CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics files
counts_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_CountsPerCDR3_withCharacteristics_2026-05-17.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  return(df)
})

patient_summary <- div_all %>%
  left_join(stats_all, by = c("patient", "receptor"))
```

```{r}
# NON PARAMETRIC ANOVA & PAIRWISE TEST IF STATISTICALLY SIGNIFICANT

diversity_metrics <- c(
  "lowQ",
  "highQ",
  "deltaqD",
  "IPq",
  "IPslope",
  "qDatIPq",
  "Shan",
  "Simp"
)

# initialize empty dataframes to store combined results
all_results <- tibble()

# run Kruskal-Wallis + Mann-Whitney and return results as dataframe
kruskal_mann_df <- function(df, metric, group_var, receptor) {
  if (!(group_var %in% names(df)) | !(metric %in% names(df))) return(NULL)
  
  df_clean <- df %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[group_var]]), !is.na(.data[[metric]]))
  
  if(n_distinct(df_clean[[group_var]]) < 2) return(NULL)
  
  kw_res <- kruskal_test(df_clean, formula = as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var))) %>%
    mutate(receptor = receptor,
           clinical_var = group_var,
           metric = metric,
           test = "Kruskal-Wallis",
           group1 = NA,
           group2 = NA,
           p.adj = NA,
           significance = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")) %>%
    select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  
  pw_res <- tibble()
  
  if(kw_res$p < 0.05) {
    pw_res <- df_clean %>%
      wilcox_test(as.formula(paste(metric, "~", group_var)), p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
      add_significance("p") %>%
      mutate(
        receptor = receptor,
        clinical_var = group_var,
        metric = metric,
        test = "Pairwise",
        significance = p.signif
      ) %>%
      select(receptor, metric, clinical_var, test, group1, group2, statistic, p, p.adj, significance)
  }
  
  bind_rows(kw_res, pw_res)
}

# TODO: update the hardcoded clinical characteristics that YOU wish to categorize by
clinical_vars <- c(
  "TNM",
  "Stage",
  "subtype"
)

# loop through receptors and clinical variables
for (rec in receptors) {
  
  df_rec <- div_all %>% filter(receptor == rec)
  
  for (clin_var in clinical_vars) {
    
    for (metric in diversity_metrics) {
      
      res <- kruskal_mann_df(df_rec, metric, clin_var, rec)
      
      if (!is.null(res)) {
        res <- res %>% mutate(metric = metric)
        all_results <- bind_rows(all_results, res)
      }
    }
  }
}

# save combined CSVs
write_csv(all_results, "Kruskal_Pairwise_All.csv")
```

```{r}
# SURVIVAL ANALYSIS

# ensure numeric
div_all <- div_all %>%
  mutate(
    Shan = as.numeric(Shan),
    Simp = as.numeric(Simp),
    IPq  = as.numeric(IPq),
    OStime = as.numeric(OStime),
    PFItime = as.numeric(PFItime)
  )

# function to create low/high groups and run survival
run_survival <- function(df, metric, time_col, event_col, label, split_type = "25_75") {
  
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[metric]]),
      !is.na(.data[[time_col]]),
      !is.na(.data[[event_col]])
    )
  
  if (split_type == "25_75") {
    q25 <- quantile(df_clean[[metric]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    q75 <- quantile(df_clean[[metric]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    df_clean <- df_clean %>%
      mutate(group = case_when(
        .data[[metric]] <= q25 ~ "Low",
        .data[[metric]] >= q75 ~ "High",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )) %>%
      filter(!is.na(group))
    
  } else if (split_type == "median") {
    med <- median(df_clean[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    df_clean <- df_clean %>%
      mutate(group = ifelse(
        .data[[metric]] <= med, "Low", "High"
      ))
  }
  
  surv_obj <- Surv(
    time = df_clean[[time_col]],
    event = df_clean[[event_col]]
  )
  
  surv_diff <- survdiff(surv_obj ~ group, data = df_clean)
  pval <- 1 - pchisq(surv_diff$chisq, df = 1)
  
  data.frame(
    receptor = unique(df_clean$receptor),
    metric = metric,
    outcome = label,
    split_type = split_type,
    n = nrow(df_clean),
    n_low = sum(df_clean$group == "Low"),
    n_high = sum(df_clean$group == "High"),
    chisq = surv_diff$chisq,
    p_value = pval
  )
}

# metrics and outcomes
metrics <- c("Shan", "Simp", "IPq")

# run for all receptors
results <- map_df(metrics, function(metric) {
  
  map_df(unique(div_all$receptor), function(rec) {
    
    df_rec <- div_all %>% filter(receptor == rec)
    
    bind_rows(
      run_survival(df_rec, metric, "OStime", "OS", "OS", split_type = "25_75"),
      run_survival(df_rec, metric, "OStime", "OS", "OS", split_type = "median"),
      
      run_survival(df_rec, metric, "PFItime", "PFI", "PFI", split_type = "25_75"),
      run_survival(df_rec, metric, "PFItime", "PFI", "PFI", split_type = "median")
    )
  })
})

# write results
write.csv(results, "Survival_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Read data
df <- read.csv("TRs+IGs_PerPatientCountStats_2026-05-17.csv")

# Clean patient names
df$patient <- gsub("\\.Aligned\\.sortedByCoord\\.out\\.bam$", "", df$patient)

# Sort from highest to lowest total_count
df <- df %>%
  mutate(patient = sub("\\.Aligned.*$", "", patient)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count)) %>%
  mutate(patient = factor(patient, levels = patient))

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = patient, y = total_count)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Patient",
    y = "Total recovered sequences (log10 scale)"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 90,
      vjust = 0.5,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 6
    )
  )

ggsave(
  "PatientRecoveryLandscape.png",
  p,
  width = 20,   # increase as needed
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```

```{r}
receptors <- c("IGH", "IGK", "IGL", "TRA", "TRB", "TRD", "TRG")

# clean patient IDs
clean_id <- function(x) {
  str_remove(x, ".Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam")
}

# load all PerPatient stats
stats_all <- map_df(receptors, function(rec) {
  file <- paste0(rec, "_PerPatientCountStats_2026-05-17.csv")
  df <- read.csv(file)
  df$patient <- clean_id(df$patient)
  df$receptor <- rec
  df
})

stats_prop <- stats_all %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  mutate(
    total_receptors = sum(total_count),
    proportion = total_count / total_receptors
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

patient_order <- stats_all %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  summarize(total_count = sum(total_count)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_count)) %>%
  pull(patient)

stats_prop$patient <- factor(stats_prop$patient, levels = patient_order)

receptor_colors <- c(
  IGH = "#08306B",  # dark blue
  IGK = "#2171B5",  # medium blue
  IGL = "#6BAED6",  # light blue

  TRA = "#00441B",  # dark green
  TRB = "#238B45",  # medium green
  TRD = "#66C2A4",  # light green
  TRG = "#B2E2E2"   # pale green
)

p_prop <- ggplot(
  stats_prop,
  aes(
    x = patient,
    y = proportion,
    fill = receptor
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = receptor_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::percent
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient",
    y = "Receptor proportion",
    fill = "Receptor"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 90,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 0.5,
      size = 6
    )
  )

ggsave(
  "PatientReceptorCompositionLandscape.png",
  p_prop,
  width = 20,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
```
